---
title: "Arrows in RevealJS"
format: revealjs
filters:
  - arrow
---

## Basic Arrow

{{< arrow from="100,200" to="400,200" >}}

A simple straight arrow.

## Curved Arrow

{{< arrow from="100,200" to="400,300" control1="250,100" color="blue" width="3" >}}

Quadratic Bezier curve.

## S-Curve Arrow

{{< arrow from="100,150" to="400,350" control1="200,100" control2="300,400" color="purple" width="3" >}}

Cubic Bezier for complex curves.

## Styled Arrows

{{< arrow from="100,180" to="300,180" color="red" width="2" >}}

{{< arrow from="100,250" to="300,250" color="green" width="4" dash="true" >}}

{{< arrow from="100,320" to="300,320" color="orange" width="3" opacity="0.6" >}}

Different colors, widths, and styles.

## Annotations

::: {style="position: relative;"}

### Key Point Here

Some important content that needs visual emphasis.

{{< arrow from="400,50" to="250,80" control1="350,30" color="crimson" width="2" position="absolute" >}}

:::

## Draw Animation

Arrows animate as they are drawn when using `fragment="true"`.

{{< arrow from="100,200" to="400,200" fragment="true" >}}

{{< arrow from="100,280" to="400,280" color="blue" fragment="true" >}}

{{< arrow from="100,360" to="400,360" color="green" fragment="true" >}}

## Animation Speed

Control draw speed with `fragment-duration` (seconds).

{{< arrow from="100,200" to="400,200" fragment="true" fragment-duration="0.3" >}}

Fast (0.3s)

{{< arrow from="100,300" to="400,300" color="purple" fragment="true" fragment-duration="1" >}}

Slow (1s)

## Fragment Order

Control the order with `fragment-index`.

{{< arrow from="100,350" to="400,350" color="red" fragment="true" fragment-index="3" >}}

Third (red)

{{< arrow from="100,280" to="400,280" color="blue" fragment="true" fragment-index="2" >}}

Second (blue)

{{< arrow from="100,200" to="400,200" color="green" fragment="true" fragment-index="1" >}}

First (green)

## Curved Draw Animation

Draw animation works with curves too.

{{< arrow from="100,200" to="400,200" curve="0.5" fragment="true" color="crimson" >}}

{{< arrow from="100,300" to="400,300" curve="0.5" bend="right" fragment="true" color="teal" >}}

## Step-by-Step Diagram

::: {style="position: relative; height: 300px;"}

Start → {{< arrow from="80,50" to="180,50" fragment="true" fragment-index="1" >}} Step 1 → {{< arrow from="220,50" to="320,50" fragment="true" fragment-index="2" >}} Step 2 → {{< arrow from="360,50" to="460,50" fragment="true" fragment-index="3" >}} Done!

:::
